Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, as to defendant Sisa Mahinay, is granted. The Court shall prepare the written order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
